name: Curried Tuna Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Chill canned tuna and asparagus until ready to serve.
2. Drain the tuna and flake it lightly.
3. Drain the asparagus pieces well.
4. Arrange lettuce on six salad plates.
5. On each salad plate, place 1/2 cup of asparagus and 1/2 cup of flaked tuna.
6. Drizzle with 2 tablespoons of Curry dressing.
7. Top with 3 slices of egg.
8. Garnish with a sprinkle of paprika.
Food Exchange per serving: 3 LEAN MEAT EXCHANGES + 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE
CAL: 211; CHO: 5g; PRO: 25g; FAT: 9g
